_comment: MULTI-MATCH Phase 0 queue. The orchestrator captures each match in turn into data/<label>/ with its own REPORT.txt. ESPN ids are final; the #coin values are PLACEHOLDERS — fill them from `python discover_markets.py` on a networked box (each WC match exposes 3 outcome markets: home-win / draw / away-win; use the Yes/side-0 coin of each). coins order = [home_win, draw, away_win].
